abilities.description: Destroy all creatures. They can't be regenerated. Threshold — If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, instead destroy all creatures, then create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying. Creatures destroyed this way can't be regenerated.

effect.description: Destroy all creatures. They can't be regenerated. Threshold — If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, instead destroy all creatures, then create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying. Creatures destroyed this way can't be regenerated.
effect.name: Branch
